info: Location: Dance Hall of the Maties Gym, Coetzenburg Road, Stellenbosch
Match Times: Warmups from 18:15, first matches at 18:45, second round at 19:45
League Format: Double round robin — top 4 play semifinals and finals
Prizes: Medals, R2500 to winner, R1000 to runner-up, R500 to semifinalists

Match Dates (Fridays):
Week 1: 10 April
Week 2: 17 April
Week 3: 24 April
Week 4: 08 May
Week 5: 15 May
Week 6: 22 May
Week 7: 29 May
— Break —
Week 8: 24 July
Week 9: 31 July
Inter-Divisional Event: 01 August
Finals: 15 August

Rules & Penalties:

1. Be on time
Arriving 10+ minutes after scheduled match time → Forfeit

2. Show up to matches
Forfeit with notice & valid reason → Forfeit
No-show → Forfeit + R200 fine + 2 warnings

3. Unsportsmanlike behaviour
Foul language, disrespectful conduct, "throwing" matches, damaging equipment → Up to discretion: warnings, fine, forfeit or expulsion

4. Wear appropriate attire
Most clothing allowed except: white shirts, distracting accessories, shoes with dark soles → Will be asked to remove/replace

Additional rules:
• Matches to be played at Maties Club only
• No rescheduling/postponements allowed — only under extreme circumstances and with the approval of the coordinator
• 3 warnings = expulsion from league
• 3 forfeits (with notice) = expulsion from league
